title: wedelia warmingii
intro: Wedelia warmingii, also known as Mexican daisy or yellow daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Wedelia warmingii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Wedelia warmingii, such as teas and infusions, are often used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
